code: import axios from"axios";const api=axios.create({baseURL:process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL||"http://localhost:8000",timeout:60000});export const queryAI=req=>api.post("/api/query",req).then(r=>r.data);export const runSearch=function(spl){let earliest=arguments.length>1&&arguments[1]!==undefined?arguments[1]:"-24h";let latest=arguments.length>2&&arguments[2]!==undefined?arguments[2]:"now";return api.post("/api/search",{spl,earliest_time:earliest,latest_time:latest,max_results:100}).then(r=>r.data);};export const getHealth=()=>api.get("/api/health").then(r=>r.data);export const getIndexes=()=>api.get("/api/indexes").then(r=>r.data);
